top_signals.title: Businesses brace for more layoffs as redundancy warnings climb to post-Pandemic high
top_signals.summary: Last year emerged as the most severe year for redundancy warnings since the height of the Covid pandemic, and early 2026 is already accelerating that trend. According to new data from the Liquidation Centre, sourced via an FOI, 2025 was the most severe year for redundancy warnings since 2020, with 315,605 jobs flagged for potential [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
